title: Decorators, Cross-Cutting Behavior, and Transparent Wrappers
description: Add retries, timing, authorization checks, and telemetry without changing business function contracts. Learners cumulatively produce a transparent decorator stack with order tests through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Translate decorator syntax into explicit rebinding and predict application order.
Separate decorator configuration, function wrapping, and call execution across closure layers.
Preserve signatures, metadata, return values, exceptions, and async behavior through wrappers.
